_meta.keyKnowledge: We choose and use the right materials, tools and techniques to safely build our designs.

_source.w: We choose and use the right materials, tools and techniques to safely build our designs.
y: Selecting the right materials and tools is essential for creating quality products.
Safe use of tools protects us and everyone around us.
Hands-on making develops practical skills that connect our ideas to reality.
eg: We select appropriate materials and explain our choices to the class.
We use tools like saws, drills or hot glue guns safely under supervision.
We practise techniques like measuring, cutting, joining and finishing.
We follow safety rules when using sharp or heated tools.
We make adjustments to our design as we build and discover what works.
We clean up our workspace and store tools properly when we finish.
